ddls:
CREATE TABLE "aircraft_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the aircraft category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the category */,
  "max_range_nm" INTEGER /* Maximum range in nautical miles for the category */,
  "max_cruise_speed_knots" INTEGER /* Maximum cruise speed in knots for the category */,
  "fuel_capacity_gallons" REAL /* Fuel capacity in gallons for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the flight route */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin airport of the route */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination airport of the route */,
  "distance_nm" INTEGER /* Distance of the route in nautical miles */,
  "estimated_flight_time" TEXT /* Estimated flight time in hh:mm format */,
  "route_duration_min" INTEGER /* Minimum duration of the route in minutes */,
  "route_duration_max" INTEGER /* Maximum duration of the route in minutes */,
  "route_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the route (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "route_status" TEXT /* Status of the route (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_routes" (
  "aircraft_route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft-route assignment */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft assigned to the route */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight route */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the aircraft was assigned to the route */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "route_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the route (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "route_status" TEXT /* Status of the route (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_routes_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES flight_routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_fleet" (
  "fleet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft in the fleet */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft model */,
  "fleet_name" TEXT /* Name of the fleet */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the aircraft was purchased */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the aircraft in the fleet (e.g., in service, out of service) */,
  "current_location" TEXT /* Current location of the aircraft */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service */,
  "service_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the next service is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fleet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_fleet_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES aircraft_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the aircraft was used */,
  "flight_time" TEXT /* Flight time in hh:mm format */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight route */,
  "distance_flown_nm" INTEGER /* Distance flown in nautical miles */,
  "flight_distance_nm" INTEGER /* Flight distance in nautical miles */,
  "fuel_consumed_gallons" REAL /* Fuel consumed in gallons */,
  "average_speed_knots" INTEGER /* Average speed in knots */,
  "passengers_carried" INTEGER /* Number of passengers carried */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the usage (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "passenger_manifest" TEXT /* List of passengers on the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_usage_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES flight_routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight schedule */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight route */,
  "departure_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of departure */,
  "arrival_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of arrival */,
  "estimated_departure" TEXT /* Estimated departure time */,
  "estimated_arrival" TEXT /* Estimated arrival time */,
  "actual_departure" TEXT /* Actual departure time */,
  "actual_arrival" TEXT /* Actual arrival time */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* Gate number at the airport */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew assigned to the flight */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the schedule (e.g., confirmed, delayed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_schedules_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_schedules_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES flight_routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident report */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., mechanical, weather-related) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the incident (e.g., under investigation, resolved) */,
  "incident_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "incident_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the incident */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the incident was resolved */,
  "incident_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., pilot, mechanic, manager) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "module_accessed" TEXT /* Module accessed by the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "permissions_level" INTEGER /* Numerical value representing the level of permissions */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the aircraft was manufactured */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the aircraft */,
  "model_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the aircraft model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the aircraft model */,
  "model_seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats in the aircraft model */,
  "model_cruise_range_nm" INTEGER /* Cruise range in nautical miles */,
  "model_cruise_speed_knots" INTEGER /* Cruise speed in knots */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_models_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES aircraft_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_specifications" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft model */,
  "spec_name" TEXT /* Name of the specification */,
  "spec_value" TEXT /* Value of the specification */,
  "spec_type" TEXT /* Type of specification (e.g., performance, dimensions) */,
  "spec_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the specification (e.g., knots, ft³) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_specifications_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES aircraft_models ("model_id")
)
